# SnapWeaz

> SnapWeaz is a creative technology studio offering design, engineering, and innovation services. Tagline: Design · Engineering · Innovation. Based in India, serving clients globally.

## Contact
- Email: info@snapweaz.com
- Website: https://www.snapweaz.com
- Response time: usually within 24 hours

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.snapweaz.com/): Studio overview and featured work
- [About](https://www.snapweaz.com/about): Studio story, values, and timeline
- [Services](https://www.snapweaz.com/services): Brand & Identity Design, UI/UX Design, Web & Software Development, Growth & Marketing
- [Divisions](https://www.snapweaz.com/divisions): Six specialized divisions — design, software, cloud, growth, ops, ventures
- [Work](https://www.snapweaz.com/work): Selected client and project case studies
- [Founder](https://www.snapweaz.com/founder): About founder Ansh A. Hedau
- [Blog](https://www.snapweaz.com/blog): Insights on design, engineering, and product
- [Careers](https://www.snapweaz.com/careers): Open roles and culture
- [Contact](https://www.snapweaz.com/contact): Project inquiries

## Services
- Brand & Identity Design — logo, visual identity, guidelines, collateral, packaging
- UI/UX Design — research, wireframes, prototypes, visual design, design systems
- Web & Software Development — web apps, mobile apps, APIs, cloud infrastructure
- Growth & Marketing — digital marketing, SEO, content, analytics, campaigns

## Legal
- [Privacy](https://www.snapweaz.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://www.snapweaz.com/terms)
